781 J2530_ORTHO_SRGRY_REPR_IND J2530_ORTHO_SRGRY_REPR_IND J2530 Ortho Surgery - RPR Other Bones CHAR 1 Repair but not replace joints.
782 J2599_ORTHO_SRGRY_OTHR_IND J2599_ORTHO_SRGRY_OTHR_IND J2599 Ortho Surgery - Other CHAR 1 Other major orthopedic surgery.
783 J2600_NRSRGCL_IND J2600_NRSRGCL_IND J2600 Neuro Surgery - Brain, Surrounding Tissue CHAR 1 Involving the brain, surrounding tissue or blood vessels (excludes skull and skin but includes cranial nerves).
